title: Gluon
body:
# gluon
Gluon is a bunch of small, and customizable vanilla-style tweaks for Minecraft.
# features
- unbreakable leads
- villagers can be leashed
- you can use blocks through signs and item frames (sneak to use the sign or item frame instead)
- /stonecutter command
- craftable leather (4 rotten flesh)
- you can craft a nether wart block into 9 nether warts
- piglin brutes drop netherite scrap (55% chance, +15% chance for every Looting level)
- piglins are neutral for 15 seconds after bartering
- piglins spawn anger particles when they get angry
# configuration
Every feature (other than recipes as of now) can be disabled and/or customized.  
Use Mod Menu (https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) to open the mod's configuration screen. 
# installation
Most of the mod's features require the mod to be installed on both the client and the server.
# modpacks
You can freely use this mod in your modpack if you want.
# updates
As of now, the mod will stay on 1.19.2 only. When 1.20 releases, the mod will be updated for that version.
